query: SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) as color_count, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as size_count FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_colors pc ON p.id = pc.product_id LEFT JOIN colors c ON pc.color_id = c.id LEFT JOIN product_sizes ps ON p.id = ps.product_id LEFT JOIN sizes s ON ps.size_id = s.id WHERE p.name LIKE '%Cotton%' OR p.name LIKE '%T-Shirt%' GROUP BY p.id, p.name;
